Hello,
I'm Lakshay!

I'm a BBA student at Chandigarh University and an AI-Driven Digital Marketing professional. I build data-informed content strategies using AI-assisted tools and prompt engineering, design and execute multi-channel campaigns, and create compelling social media narratives that convert.
My competitive edge: I don't just understand business, consumer behavior, and brand strategy — I apply AI to execute faster and smarter. From my work at Nation Innovation, I've scaled a LinkedIn channel from zero to 6,326 impressions with a 4,726% reach growth in just 90 days.
